---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: [Short description]"
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''

---

**Maintenance Task Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task (e.g., code refactoring, dependency update, documentation improvement).

**Impact**
Explain the impact of this maintenance task. Will it improve performance, readability, or security?

**Proposed Changes**
A clear and concise description of the changes you plan to make.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
